programme.title: E9 - Change Of Scenery
programme.desc: Alison joins forces with a husband-and-wife realtor team to restore a three-bedroom Spanish Revival in California's Hollywood Hills.

programme.title: E1 - Food Of The Gods: Grandma Vernelle's Ambrosia
programme.desc: Chef Casey Corn travels to Los Angeles to help a close-knit group of cousins recreate their grandma's lost ambrosia recipe.

programme.title: E2 - Frozen In Time: Grandma Lil's Jewish-Italian-American Meatball Sauce
programme.desc: Casey visits a New York family to help them rediscover their Grandma Lil's unique, Jewish-Italian-American meatball sauce.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E404 - Face the Music with the Casagrandes / Pranks for the Memories with the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne discovers that each family member will perform for Hector's birthday, she turns to Sid for help. // Ronnie Anne's attempts to bond with her cool older cousin Carlota lead to a prank war against the boy cousins.

programme.title: E408 - Can't Hardly Wait / A Mutt Above
programme.desc: Lori takes a waitressing job at Dad's restaurant, but it turns out that serving is harder than she anticipated. // Spurred on by a classmate's mocking about Charles, Lana decides to train him to compete in a local dog show.

programme.title: E111 - Where There's a Will, There's a Way / Lost in the Sauce
programme.desc: When the house AC breaks during an extreme heat wave, Will takes it upon himself to protect his family and fix it. // Ellie insists on running Raven Club like a dictatorship, so Jack & Lil quit, and Ellie must save her investigation AND best friends.

programme.title: E112 - Follow the Sprinkles / Canyon Valley V. Dirk
programme.desc: When Lily starts digging to find out why her favorite ice cream truck is selling shaved ice, she uncovers a town-wide conspiracy. // Dirk is wrongfully accused of stealing a Canyon Valley landmark so Min comes out of lawyer retirement to help him.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E202 - Intern for the Worse / The Old and the Restless
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. // When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: E204 - Suite and Sour / Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids - but only because they promised to behave. // When Lucy gets a crush on a 'regular and normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: E208 - No Such Luck / Frog Wild
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities. // When Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: E107 - Not So Fast and Furious
programme.desc: A new super-fast villain is wreaking havoc in Secret Shores, and Billy is the only hope at tracking her down. After Billy's speed accidentally triggers an avalanche, however, he decides to hang up his cape and retire from being a superhero.

programme.title: E305 - Miles Sells His Soul
programme.desc: In an effort to help Mika defeat her rival in a riff-off, Miles sells his soul to a suave demon who lives in The Man's Nest Abyss Room. Captain Man must face the demon in a Ukulele-Log-Rolling competition in order to get all the kids' souls back.

programme.title: E533 - Rumblr
programme.desc: Captain Man, sick of fighting the same old villains, is convinced to make a profile on a match making app for heroes and villains. Kid Danger agrees to do the same and two of them set up a double-fight to square off with some new villains.

programme.title: E534 - Cave the Date
programme.desc: Henry and the gang set up a secret underground restaurant in the Man Cave for Charlotte's private dinner with music superstar Jack Swagger. When word gets out that Jack Swagger is in town, some unwanted guests crash the party.

programme.title: E112 - The Pearl
programme.desc: The East River 3 are on the verge of victory! The Turtles and Mutanimals must team up to stop them, but not everything is as it seems... what is the PEARL and why does Goldfin want it?

programme.title: E703 - Candy Crushed / Master of Delusion
programme.desc: Lola struggles to dampen her sweet tooth when mom challenges her to go an entire week without sugar. // Lincoln strives to impress the Amazing Brailster when he's chosen to be his assistant at the Illusion Chateau.

programme.title: E209 - SpongeBob's Place / Plankton Gets the Boot
programme.desc: When SpongeBob cooks at home, Mr. Krabs' customers leave his restaurant and head for SpongeBob's Place. // When Plankton gets kicked out of the house, it's up to SpongeBob to teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: E116 - Trouble At The Truck Wash
programme.desc: When an overeager Crusher causes the Truck Wash to explode out into Axle City, Blaze and friends will need your help using angles to recover the pieces and get the trucks clean again!

programme.title: E117 - Cattle Drive
programme.desc: When Blaze and Starla encounter a herd of cows wandering out in the desert, they must embark on a wild west adventure to bring them back to Starla's barn.

programme.title: E106 - The Crew Builds A Skate Park / The Crew Builds A Tunnel
programme.desc: The Crew has a mishap while building a skatepark. // The Crew helps a pop star get her tour bus to town.

programme.title: E318 - Pups In A Jam / Pups Save A Windsurfing Pig
programme.desc: It's the annual Jamboree Jamfest, but all of the fruit is carried off by ants! It's up to the pups to lure the ants to safety. // Zuma is on a wacky water rescue after Cornelius the pig goes for a ride on a windsurfing board.

programme.title: E319 - Pups Get Growing / Pups Save A Space Toy
programme.desc: Fertilizer causes Yumi's crops to sprout huge veggies, so Ryder and the Paw Patrol must corral the stampeding produce! // The Paw Patrol draws a message on Farmer Al's field to tell the space aliens the pups found their lost toy!

programme.title: E402 - Mito Dreams Of La Playa
programme.desc: Dora helps her friend Mito the Yeti see the beach for the first time and he even wins the sandcastle competition!

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow

programme.desc: Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure.

programme.title: E105 - Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E109 - Daddy Loses His Glasses
programme.desc: Daddy Pig is a little upset because he lost his glasses, so Peppa and George try to find them.

programme.title: E110 - Gardening
programme.desc: Peppa and George enjoy helping Grandpa Pig plant seeds in his garden.

programme.title: E112 - Bicycles
programme.desc: Daddy Pig has grown a huge pumpkin and Peppa is riding her bike, but says she wants to ride without training wheels. But soon she crashes into the pumpkin.

programme.desc: Madame Gazelle is getting Peppa and her playgroup friends to dance to all different styles of music.

programme.title: E318 - Sharks On A Boat
programme.desc: The Sharkpack board Barb's boat to go after the loose sharkpups.

programme.desc: When Speed Meister sabotages the stage for the town Talent Show, the pups use Motor's talent to save the day. // Sierra Sparkle is coming to sing for Builder Cove Day! But when the band's instruments break, Rubble & Crew have a construction solution.

programme.title: E122 - The Crew Builds A Giant Dam / The Crew Builds A Squirrel-Proof Farm
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are on the job to save Builder Cove after a rainstorm threatens to flood the town. // Rubble and Motor come up with crafty construction solutions to fix Farmer Zoe's squirrel problem before the Farm Fair.

programme.desc: A fantasy fire breathing dragon comes to life and won't let Ryder and pups into the Lookout! Paw Patrol takes to the Air Patroller! // The Paw Patrol help three little pigs build new houses after theirs mysteriously disappear.

programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E8 - Silly Things
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing about silly things that make them smile.

programme.title: E13 - Weepy
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy finds a very dusty sock underneath his bed, but why does it make him teary? He goes to OKIDO to find out.

programme.desc: Preston's automated scooter tour of Swoppiton doesn't go as planned. Mojo and Bo must find a way to chase down and scoop up those scooters, and get the tour back on track!

programme.title: E8 - It's Time To Make Up A Story
programme.desc: When JoJo can't find her favourite Captain Chloe storybook, Gran Gran suggests they make up their own story.

programme.title: E22 - Constable Quack
programme.desc: After their snacks go missing, Sergeant Sarah & Constable Quack are on the trail of a biscuit burglar.

programme.title: E14 - Takeaway
programme.desc: Forced to wait five minutes in front of a restaurant for their takeaway, Bluey and Bingo become restless for entertainment, pushing the very limits of Dad's patience.

programme.title: E15 - Butterflies
programme.desc: Playing 'Butterflies' in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends.

programme.desc: Bingo loves playing with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep the fun within her limits.

programme.desc: Snail is thrilled to be moving house as she wishes to escape the wet and sploshy place she currently calls home to a more spacious house on the hill.

programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters save the world's stinkiest plant from becoming Glitch's latest perfume?

programme.title: E6 - Machu Picchu, Peru
programme.desc: A giant grimbot bounces down the valley of Machu Picchu. Can the Go Jetters stop him?

programme.desc: Larry is cooking steamed tofu, egg and prawn. China is famous for its wonderful food so Larry's friends are very excited to come over for his Chinese themed meal.

programme.desc: He-He Krash and Amelia play. Amelia tells everyone that her flight is the most interesting

programme.title: E1 - Dance Mode
programme.desc: After Dad eats her last chip, Bingo is given three chances to put Mum and Dad in 'Dance Mode' as payback. But the others can't resist taking Bingo's turns for her.

programme.title: E528 - Armed To Party
programme.desc: A young man who came to the U.S. to fulfil his dreams is killed at a birthday party, and Tulsa police must cut through a web of lies to find the culprit.

programme.title: E147
programme.desc: A convicted felon shows the judge his gunshot wounds; a judge can't stop laughing at a defendant's inability to parallel park; a convicted killer must face a judge known as 'Scary Mary'; and more.

programme.title: E148
programme.desc: A convicted felon drops the f-bomb during a virtual hearing; a grieving mother brings her son's ashes to his killer's sentencing; and more.

programme.title: E105 - End Game
programme.desc: In Mobile, a professor is murdered in his own home. It takes a missing gaming console and a strategic game of cat and mouse with the suspects for detectives and prosecutors to get justice.

programme.title: E1 - Curtis Reeves
programme.desc: Curtis Reeves stands accused of murdering Chad Oulson over popcorn at a matinee movie. The defence claims he acted in self-defence—that Oulson was the aggressor.

programme.title: E8 - When Push Comes To Shove
programme.desc: When Toni meets Harold at a medical convention, they click and soon marry. But when money starts going missing from Toni's account, suspicion falls on Harold.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: A longstanding feud comes to a head when two neighbours confront each other with guns; a school bus driver goes on a dangerous high-speed chase to outrun an irate parent who attacks her bus with a hammer.

programme.title: E4 - Linda Carty
programme.desc: Linda Carty was sentenced to death on February 19, 2001 for the kidnapping of three-day-old newborn Ray Cabrera, and the kidnapping and murder of his mother, Joana Rodriguez.

programme.title: E2 - Murdered My Boss Or Innocent Employee?
programme.desc: After a construction company boss is found shot dead, no arrests are made. An employee says he'd been bound and gagged by a gang just before the shooting. But 14 years later police charge him with murder.

programme.title: E4 - Episode Four
programme.desc: OJ’s behaviour sparks a media frenzy, culminating in a high-profile trial. His ongoing violence raises concerns about what happened to Sydney and Justin.

programme.title: E4 - Episode Four
programme.desc: OJ’s behaviour sparks a media frenzy, culminating in a high-profile trial. His ongoing violence raises concerns about what happened to Sydney and Justin.

programme.title: E6 - Lake Geneva, Between Lakes And Mountains
programme.desc: Welcome to the Chablais Savoyard, a picturesque region between lakes and mountains, renowned for its natural beauty and rich cultural heritage. A land of contrasts, snow-capped peaks stand alongside green valleys and charming villages. The lakeside towns, famous for their thermal baths, attract many visitors.

programme.title: E1 - Dumplings And Other Stuffed Pastas
programme.desc: With Myriam Fehmiu, Anita Feng, Jason Kacprzak, and Jens Ruoff, Christian embarks on a world tour of stuffed pastas. Vegetarian dumplings, maultaschen, pierogi... the chefs share all their tips and tricks for high-level preparation.

programme.title: E23 - Beautiful Loft In Brussels
programme.desc: In Brussels, in a building whose structure is made of wood, Cedric and Virginie discover a loft open to the outside.

programme.title: E3 - Clementine De Chabaneix/Nathalie And Christophe Legrand
programme.desc: Visit to the three museums at the Polish Library in Paris. Shapes navigate between imaginary worlds in ceramic artist Clementine de Chabaneix's universe. Willy Chavarria, American-Mexican designer and activist, shows at the American Cathedral in Paris. Bookbinders and gilders, Nathalie and Christophe Legrand restore books which they cover in light.

programme.title: E2 - Navigating The Terrain
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas travel to Murdochville, in Gaspesie, and learn how backcountry skiing revived the local economy. They try cat-skiing with Guillaume Molaison and are introduced to avalanche risks by Julie Leblanc.

programme.title: E4 - Taro, The Polynesians' Tuber
programme.desc: Taro, long a staple food in the Polynesian islands, is still cultivated today in every archipelago. In the Australs, its cultivation is the most intensive: taro fields are an integral part of the inhabitants' daily lives.

programme.title: E11 - Rice Pudding
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Dominique Henon, a French variety and gypsy jazz singer, into her kitchen. She shares her version of breakfast, which consists of a creamy, indulgent rice pudding, brioche pudding and strawberry coulis.

programme.title: E32 - Sully-Sur-Loire - Le Hallier
programme.desc: The Sange Tower of the Sully-sur-Loire castle, a former watchtower, offers a breathtaking view. Its exact use remains unclear, but it probably served the soldiers. Not far from Pithiviers, in Nibelle, the Hallier castle was a gift from King Charles IX to Marie Touchet.

programme.title: E27 - While Waiting For Summer
programme.desc: On the menu: egg and fine herb nests, spring roll bundles, ricotta, green bean and asparagus sandwich, lemon tarts.

programme.title: E6 - Lake Geneva, Between Lakes And Mountains

A land of contrasts, snow-capped peaks stand alongside green valleys and charming villages. The lakeside towns, famous for their thermal baths, attract many visitors.

programme.title: E1 - Dumplings And Other Stuffed Pastas
programme.desc: With Myriam Fehmiu, Anita Feng, Jason Kacprzak, and Jens Ruoff, Christian embarks on a world tour of stuffed pastas. Vegetarian dumplings, maultaschen, pierogi... the chefs share all their tips and tricks for high-level preparation.

programme.title: E23 - Beautiful Loft In Brussels
programme.desc: In Brussels, in a building whose structure is made of wood, Cedric and Virginie discover a loft open to the outside.

programme.title: E3 - Clementine De Chabaneix/Nathalie And Christophe Legrand
programme.desc: Visit to the three museums at the Polish Library in Paris. Shapes navigate between imaginary worlds in ceramic artist Clementine de Chabaneix's universe. Willy Chavarria, American-Mexican designer and activist, shows at the American Cathedral in Paris. Bookbinders and gilders, Nathalie and Christophe Legrand restore books which they cover in light.

programme.title: E2 - Navigating The Terrain
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas travel to Murdochville, in Gaspesie, and learn how backcountry skiing revived the local economy. They try cat-skiing with Guillaume Molaison and are introduced to avalanche risks by Julie Leblanc.

programme.title: E4 - Taro, The Polynesians' Tuber
programme.desc: Taro, long a staple food in the Polynesian islands, is still cultivated today in every archipelago. In the Australs, its cultivation is the most intensive: taro fields are an integral part of the inhabitants' daily lives.

programme.title: E11 - Rice Pudding
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Dominique Henon, a French variety and gypsy jazz singer, into her kitchen. She shares her version of breakfast, which consists of a creamy, indulgent rice pudding, brioche pudding and strawberry coulis.

programme.title: E32 - Sully-Sur-Loire - Le Hallier
programme.desc: The Sange Tower of the Sully-sur-Loire castle, a former watchtower, offers a breathtaking view. Its exact use remains unclear, but it probably served the soldiers. Not far from Pithiviers, in Nibelle, the Hallier castle was a gift from King Charles IX to Marie Touchet.

programme.title: E27 - While Waiting For Summer
programme.desc: On the menu: egg and fine herb nests, spring roll bundles, ricotta, green bean and asparagus sandwich, lemon tarts.

programme.title: E6 - Lake Geneva, Between Lakes And Mountains
programme.desc: Welcome to the Chablais Savoyard, a picturesque region between lakes and mountains, renowned for its natural beauty and rich cultural heritage. A land of contrasts, snow-capped peaks stand alongside green valleys and charming villages. The lakeside towns, famous for their thermal baths, attract many visitors.

programme.title: E1 - Dumplings And Other Stuffed Pastas
programme.desc: With Myriam Fehmiu, Anita Feng, Jason Kacprzak, and Jens Ruoff, Christian embarks on a world tour of stuffed pastas. Vegetarian dumplings, maultaschen, pierogi... the chefs share all their tips and tricks for high-level preparation.

programme.title: E23 - Beautiful Loft In Brussels
programme.desc: In Brussels, in a building whose structure is made of wood, Cedric and Virginie discover a loft open to the outside.

programme.title: E3 - Clementine De Chabaneix/Nathalie And Christophe Legrand
programme.desc: Visit to the three museums at the Polish Library in Paris. Shapes navigate between imaginary worlds in ceramic artist Clementine de Chabaneix's universe. Willy Chavarria, American-Mexican designer and activist, shows at the American Cathedral in Paris. Bookbinders and gilders, Nathalie and Christophe Legrand restore books which they cover in light.

programme.title: E2 - Navigating The Terrain
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas travel to Murdochville, in Gaspesie, and learn how backcountry skiing revived the local economy. They try cat-skiing with Guillaume Molaison and are introduced to avalanche risks by Julie Leblanc.

programme.title: E12 - Cycle Around Japan - Gifu: The Joys Of Mountain Life (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: A 360km ride through Gifu, into the mountains at Japan's center. In these high valleys, culture inspired by nature - by fire, water and wood - breeds a passion for discovering ways to enjoy life.

programme.title: E3 - Chasing Dopamine (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: Screen time is the new go-to reward for motivating kids. Behavioural scientist Jean offers insights to the dilemma - does digital incentives motivate or feed the urge for more?

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.desc: Outre-mer explore le quotidien des habitants des îles d'Outremer. L'émission revient sur toutes les problématiques rencontrées par les locaux.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

E2 - The Last Komodo Dragon
programme.desc: On the volcanic slopes of the Sunda Islands, dozens of reptiles thrive in this archipelago paradise.

programme.title: E3 - Volume 3
programme.desc: This time we get up close to the iconic stone monoliths of America's Monument Valley and swoop through the natural settings of the Lord of the Ring's films.

programme.title: E6 - Giant Softshell Turtle
programme.desc: In Vietnam, Forrest teams up with a conservation group to save the largest turtle species in the world from extinction.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Revealing a different side to a nation most famous for its hyper-modern metropolises, this pure wildlife docuseries travels from Hokkaido's vast forests to the lush coastlines of Okinawa to uncover the secrets of Japan's most iconic animals.

programme.title: E6 - Giant Softshell Turtle

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: Jason is in the Dubai Marina as he explores food that looks so good it goes viral.

programme.title: E1 - Spring
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates rhubarb in a lip-smacking sauce, heroes spinach in a silky goat's cheese risotto and marries vibrant basil with chard in a crowd-pleasing cheesy spring cannelloni

programme.title: E2 - Southwater
programme.desc: Ordering a factory-built house was a no-brainer for manufacturing maestro Pete. But, in true self-building style, even a near-finished project brings challenges like a bat out of hell.

programme.title: E3 - Nusfjord Arctic Resort, Norway
programme.desc: Nusfjord Arctic Resort is a preserved 200-year-old cod fishing village in the Lofoten Islands of Norway. Working alongside the dedicated team, Monica and Rob learn to appreciate the difficulties of running a high-end resort in such an extreme environment.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Alan takes charge of tackling the first bedroom, and he doesn't hold back with his design. Inspired by the romance and history of his favourite city, Florence, he's determined to have a mural.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Graham Norton presents a lively chat show featuring Dwayne Johnson, Emily Blunt, Matthew McConaughey, James Norton and RAYE.

programme.title: E1 - Spices
programme.desc: Jason's debut in Dubai is all things spice as he explores a traditional souk in the old town, shows us how to spice up our lives, and is joined by local chef Rahul Rana.

programme.title: Home Away From Home S4
programme.desc: a travel & lifestyle show that celebrates Filipino stories abroad as it chronicles Filipino communities all over the world and explores cultural exchanges of Pinoys in their home away from home.

programme.title: Tao Po[Live]
programme.desc: 'Tao Po' is a compelling Current Affairs program that uncovers the lives of the 'real people' behind the headlines, offering intimate interviews and insightful glimpses into their personal journeys and the issues they represent.

programme.title: TV Patrol Regional
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: TV Patrol Linggo Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: Pepito Manaloto, Tuloy Ang Kuwento
programme.desc: The continuing comedic chronicle of the life of Pepito Manaloto, a lucky multimillion lotto winner, his family, and the merry mix of neighbors and colleagues.

programme.title: Maka 2
programme.desc: It is a youth-oriented drama series that follows the lives of six high school students enrolled in the Arts & Performance section of public school, Douglas Mac Arthur High School for the Arts aka. MAKA.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 故事描繪一位除了愛什麼都不懂的笨拙綁匪與一位不懂愛的天才少女，性格迥異的命運共同體“父女”，展開一段獨特的逃亡旅程。主角新庄政宗（齋藤工）為了籌措患有心臟病女兒的手術費，在妻子的提議下，決定綁架富有的醫院院長之女七瀬凛（永尾柚乃）。新庄一直猶豫不決，但在妻子不斷策動下，他終於開車來到院長宅邸附近時，一名女孩突然衝到他的車前。千鈞一髮之際，避免了事故。當凛醒來時，卻發現她失去記憶。新庄情急之下謊稱自己是她的爸爸，從此被迫開始扮演“父親”的角色。而凛的父母已被某個神秘人物殺害，新庄也因此成為殺人嫌疑犯。然而他所綁架的凛，竟是一位能操多國語言、博學多聞、思維敏捷的天才少女。從這一刻起，原本居於主導地位的新庄反而成了凛的依靠，開始向她尋求擺脫困境的建議，兩人的關係也因此徹底逆轉。除了警方外，新庄與凛還遭到來歷不明、意圖不明的男子追擊。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.desc: 故事描繪一位除了愛什麼都不懂的笨拙綁匪與一位不懂愛的天才少女，性格迥異的命運共同體“父女”，展開一段獨特的逃亡旅程。主角新庄政宗（齋藤工）為了籌措患有心臟病女兒的手術費，在妻子的提議下，決定綁架富有的醫院院長之女七瀬凛（永尾柚乃）。新庄一直猶豫不決，但在妻子不斷策動下，他終於開車來到院長宅邸附近時，一名女孩突然衝到他的車前。千鈞一髮之際，避免了事故。當凛醒來時，卻發現她失去記憶。新庄情急之下謊稱自己是她的爸爸，從此被迫開始扮演“父親”的角色。而凛的父母已被某個神秘人物殺害，新庄也因此成為殺人嫌疑犯。然而他所綁架的凛，竟是一位能操多國語言、博學多聞、思維敏捷的天才少女。從這一刻起，原本居於主導地位的新庄反而成了凛的依靠，開始向她尋求擺脫困境的建議，兩人的關係也因此徹底逆轉。除了警方外，新庄與凛還遭到來歷不明、意圖不明的男子追擊。

programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 晴原柑九朗作為SDM本部首席代表兼氣象研究員利用智慧與知識，冒著生命危險站在最前線，保護人們的性命免受巨大氣象災害威脅，為使命奮鬥的故事。​

programme.desc: A bounty hunter learns that his next target is his ex-wife.

programme.title: E1 - Mom Gone Wild
programme.desc: Survival expert Bear Grylls takes real people who inspire him into the wild. On the series premiere, Jennifer, a glamper mom of four - two of which have down syndrome - learns camping skills to impress her outdoor-loving family while Bear learns about her international quest that helped save lives.

programme.desc: Wardens follow a bear of a case. Then the comical story of a decoy deer gone wrong.

programme.desc: Jess visits Northstar Bison to learn about the small family-run ranch's breeding and processing operation, then prepares her signature smash burger.

programme.desc: Jess heads to Oklahoma, where she takes aim at one of the state's estimated 1.5 million feral hogs.

programme.title: E12 - Chris and Kim With Sherryl
programme.desc: Chris and Kim, tired of throwing money away on a cramped apartment in Whitehorse, seek to find the perfect home.

programme.desc: Episode 101 of Showdown of the Unbeatables features BCB Air Cannon vs. Line X coating; an automated paintball turret vs. a worlds record holding slingshot marksman; and the RX Rock Breaker vs. the inpenetrable Brown Safe.

programme.title: Colossal Squid
programme.desc: Ant and Fontaine hunt for the rarest of ocean creatures, the colossal squid. But what happens when it turns out to be smarter than you?

programme.title: Justice
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, safety's a little shaky. So is justice! It's ‘Sheriff' Howler's job to hunt down outlaws and bring them before the judge. But the methods he uses are a trifle different from what we're used to today!

programme.title: The Periodic Table
programme.desc: How does the Periodic Table work? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of chemistry. Have hands-on fun by decoding a secret message on a blank piece of paper, and get to know Dmitri Mendeleev, a chemist and inventor – the father of the Periodic Table.

programme.title: Reuse Wool
programme.desc: Today the Grimwade family decides to reuse the wool from Mummy's jumper. Grandma Melanie arrives and teaches Halle to finger knit while attempting to teach Daddy to knit with needles. Harper plans to make a toy farm and this gives grandma an idea.

programme.title: All for One, and One For All
programme.desc: Each of the kids wants to play a different game, but when the competition gets too fierce, they must use teamwork to play together.

programme.title: Art Spinner
programme.desc: Rotate to create with this crafty contraption.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part II
programme.desc: Our heroes prepare for a sleepover in the HQ, but it seems impossible to divide the space, so they each have a separate bedroom. Alim knows of places where people feel more comfortable sleeping together in the same room. Everyone is soon in Japan for a new adventure.

programme.title: Time to Be Amazing
programme.desc: It's the first time Harry and George will be competing since George broke his arm and was told he would never be able to do gym again. And Dove and Nyree are determined to prove they are ready to take on the world!

programme.title: The Magician (Steven Frayne) and The Captain (Kate Richardson-Walsh)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, the 'Undisputed King of Magic' Steven Frayne (aka Dynamo) and Olympic gold medallist hockey captain Kate Richardson-Walsh share their insights on success.

programme.title: Doggy Etiquette
programme.desc: Marisa's shower stall becomes a kitten birthing suite. Laura, Dawn, and Ziggy hit downtown for another lesson in doggy etiquette. Xavier rescues a confused kangaroo from a coastal caravan park.

programme.title: If the Shoe Fits ...
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how many ways a shoelace can be tied? Four ways? Six ways? No, 43,000 ways! In this episode we learn everything there is to know about different types of patterning: over and under, left and right, in and out, zigzag and crisscross, etc.

programme.title: Pick a Block of Dates - Any Block
programme.desc: This episode introduces the mathematical mean: the number you get when you add up all numbers and divide them by the number of numbers. Eric presents a trick you can do by calculating the sum of a 3-by-3 block of dates on a calendar without using a calculator.

programme.title: Anything Could Happen
programme.desc: A surprising new partnership is announced when coach Nikki decides to pair up Dylan and Nyree. Finn, Kirsten, and Dove have all made life-changing decisions, and Amelie and Phoebe head off to Lillishall for an exclusive Olympic training camp.

programme.title: Glacier National Park
programme.desc: This week we head to the beautiful landscape of Glacier National Park, where Philippe uncovers insect fossils dating back 45 million years, spots wild huckleberries, and joins students participating in a citizen science expedition.

programme.title: All for One, and One For All
programme.desc: Each of the kids wants to play a different game, but when the competition gets too fierce, they must use teamwork to play together.

programme.title: Art Spinner
programme.desc: Rotate to create with this crafty contraption.

programme.title: The Magician (Steven Frayne) and The Captain (Kate Richardson-Walsh)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, the 'Undisputed King of Magic' Steven Frayne (aka Dynamo) and Olympic gold medallist hockey captain Kate Richardson-Walsh share their insights on success.

programme.title: Justice
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, safety's a little shaky. So is justice! It's ‘Sheriff' Howler's job to hunt down outlaws and bring them before the judge. But the methods he uses are a trifle different from what we're used to today!

programme.desc: Former baseball pro Alex Rodriguez quietly built a real estate empire over 20 years. Now, after retiring from baseball, he's accelerating his transformation from former athlete to investor and owner.

programme.title: Leaders With Lacqua
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua interviews some of the most influential people on the planet.

programme.title: Bloomberg Studio 1.0
programme.desc: Bloomberg's Emily Chang interviews prominent business leaders.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, hosted by David Westin in New York.

programme.title: E2 - Learning Fun at Home & School!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning fun at home & school! First, Mom & Dad put together a road in their backyard so the kids can learn about road safety while driving their toy cars. Then, it's time for a snack as Baby John learns his ABCs with Mom & Dad as they enjoy a delicious bowl of alphabet cereal! The learning continues at school, where the kids learn their body parts, see what's for lunch & learn how to play nicely with their friends.

programme.title: E1 - Crazy Competitions & Robot Malfunctions!
programme.desc: It's a day of crazy competitions & robot malfunctions! First, a friendly competition in the park turns into a wild go-kart race between Arpo & his rival, Nannybot! Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire. A toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably all over the backyard, & a malfunctioning birthday present massage chair chases him & Daniel around the house! From boomerang target practice to a building block showdown, the chaos never stops!

programme.title: E2 - Tiny Heroes, Giant-Sized Adventures!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle may be small, but they're tiny heroes on giant-sized adventures! When a hamster gets stuck in a colorful cardboard maze, a rescue mission begins! Mila & Morphle get shrunk to hamster size & go into the maze to find their little furry pal. Then, when a whale gets stranded on the beach, the friends shrink it to get it back to the ocean. But when Winston races away with the tiny whale, the chase is on!

programme.title: E2 - When Magical Pet Powers Run Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos as Magical Pet powers run wild! First, Bubblebear creates so many bubbles that they join together & become a giant Bubble Monster that traps everyone! Then, when Shrubcub gets sick, Pet Port is invaded by wayward vines, & the friends have to race against time to get her some magic tea. The wild powers continue as Slushyseal turns buildings & cars into giant juice pops that start to melt all over town!

programme.title: E1 - A Fun School Day with JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his friends for a fun school day at Melon Patch Academy! Ms. Appleberry finds exciting ways to learn, like using building blocks & drawings to practice the alphabet. Then, the kids play a fun guessing game to learn all about the five senses & how to sign them in ASL! The learning continues as they sing about the days of the week, play a fun alphabet photo game on a rainy day & enjoy story time with the whole family. It's a day packed with learning & fun!

programme.title: E2 - Siblings Month: Bedtime Stories & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for bedtime stories & fun with JJ! First, join JJ, TomTom & YoYo for a slumber party where they jump, wiggle & shuffle in their cute pajamas! Then, help them find five missing little ducks before bedtime. The fun continues with a busy morning routine, a heroic bath time rescue with sea creature toys & a game of 'Happy and You Know It' to cheer everyone up! It's a month of cozy moments & sibling fun.

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E8 - Siblings Month: Pretend Play Fun!
programme.desc: It's time for pretend play fun with the siblings! First, water balloons take their pirate play to the next level for a wet & adventurous journey! Then, inspired by a firetruck, the kids form their very own rescue team to help those around them. The pretend play continues as Baby John becomes a police officer to solve the mystery of the missing cupcakes & Jack becomes a detective to find out who made a mess with the sheep toy!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.desc: Quawntay Adams gets caught up in a big marijuana bust and is sentenced to a long prison term. When he finds out he is going to be a father, he determines to break out of his maximum-security cell.

programme.title: Natsui Itsuki's Haiku Trip! 'Sendai, Miyagi'
programme.desc: Haiku poet Natsui Itsuki sets “Haiku Post” across Japan, and receives “your piece of Haiku”! She selects unique works from among them, and invites the authors of those haiku to share their intentions, memories, and life stories. ROLAND, the King of the Hosts, accompanies her as a partner on the trip.

programme.title: News Talk -22/3/26
programme.desc: News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: E472
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. This program shows the great architectures and how they inspire us in various ways.

programme.title: E163
programme.desc: Phoenix Satellite TV creates a brand-new Greater Bay Area magazine-style column 'GBA Discovery' with a total duration of 26 minutes. Phoenix reporters visited the Greater Bay Area in person and discovered the latest and most interesting events, people, and achievements in the Greater Bay Area. The column is divided into three sections: hotspots in the Bay Area, people in the Bay Area, and coordinates in the Bay Area.

programme.title: E216
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Special column of character record. Through the exquisite length of about 15 minutes in each episode, it tells the stories of Hong Kong people and what happened. For the national Chinese audience, understand the new perspective of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Docu Insight
programme.desc: A premium documentary series from Korea's public broadcaster KBS

programme.title: E311
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: E612
programme.desc: Parenting challenges of 'Superman' , the first hero that children encounter when they are born.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.desc: Romantic comedy about uniformed elite cadets chasing after their dreams.

programme.title: E18 - 劉宇寧召集Seven Kids重聚 (下)
programme.desc: 將繼續以「音樂牽線，緣分發聲」為主題，賽制上進行了全面創新升級，帶來更具懸念的緣分匹配設定、更多元的趣味互動模式，以及更動人的團隊默契考驗；匯聚周深、薛之謙、單依純等10位實力歌手與新銳音樂人，通過盲選歌單、即興創作等環碰撞靈感，打造專屬合作舞台！

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 非物質文化遺產即某地區文化傳承有重要意義的行為或表現，如民俗、文化、信仰、傳統等各種智慧財產；為了全面展示保護的成果，推動高品質發展，節目打造以非物質文化遺產傳承為主題，令更多人認識及發揚光大。

programme.title: E9 - 探討愛情裡的「拯救欲」
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E48
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E11 - 愛當月老的相親男
programme.desc: 明星助力官繼續傾情加盟，通過快問快答揭秘明星不為人知的經歷和情感往事，以獨特視角助陣男女嘉賓尋找真愛。以星素之間和代際之間的磁場碰撞，解讀當下年輕人的婚戀觀。

programme.title: E9 - 探討愛情裡的「拯救欲」
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E48
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: Dreams In The Dust - The Divided Rise Of Afghan Cricket
programme.desc: Afghanistan has risen from sporting outsider to one of the world's top cricket nations. The unlikely journey has brought hope to a country with rare reason to celebrate while illuminating the complex politics of the Taliban's relationship to cricket.

programme.title: Ai & Drones: Possibilities And Risks
programme.desc: AI-enhanced drones are transforming warfare and how security agencies work. In Mexico, the police are using armed drones against cartels. In Ghana, authorities are using drones and AI to track down illegal gold mines.

programme.title: Blind Youth In Delhi Use Acroyoga To Overcome Exclusion
programme.desc: In Delhi, visually impaired youth deal with exclusion and fear in a chaotic city. But through acroyoga, they build trust and confidence, defying disability and societal neglect. Yoga helps them connect with their bodies and reclaim visibility in a world that often overlooks them.

programme.title: Ai & Drones: Possibilities And Risks
programme.desc: AI-enhanced drones are transforming warfare and how security agencies work. In Mexico, the police are using armed drones against cartels. In Ghana, authorities are using drones and AI to track down illegal gold mines.

programme.title: Mercedes: Iconic German Brand Or Three-Pointed Fallen Star?
programme.desc: Pummeled by Trump's tariffs and fierce competition in China, Mercedes-Benz's operating profits plunged in 2025. Why is its CEO upbeat? Plus: How e-bikes are making Ugandans life easier and test driving Kia's PV5.

programme.title: Animal Invaders - The Battle Against Unwanted Species
programme.desc: Invasive species threaten flora and fauna and can destroy ecological balance. However, combating these dangerous invaders is costly and requires unusual measures.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. programme.title: The Tech Download
programme.desc: Hosted by Arjun Kharpal and Steve Kovach, CNBC's “Tech Download” podcast cuts through the noise to unpack the technology stories that matter most. With access to industry leaders and years of experience covering the biggest tech news, Arjun and Steve deliver sharp analysis and compelling narratives on the trends, risks and innovations shaping tech.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

With access to industry leaders and years of experience covering the biggest tech news, Arjun and Steve deliver sharp analysis and compelling narratives on the trends, risks and innovations shaping tech.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: CNBC Sports - PGA Tour
programme.desc: Highlights from the latest PGA TOUR tournament.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.desc: A couple's romantic weekend plans are dashed as quickly as the sunlight turns to showers.

programme.title: E3 - Angkor
programme.desc: Peter Lee visits Angkor to discover how the ancient Khmer overcame nature to thrive, leaving behind iconic ruins that lie at the heart of Cambodian identity.

programme.title: E4 - Lucknow To Kolkata
programme.desc: On an epic railway journey from Lucknow in Uttar Pradesh to Kolkata in West Bengal, Michael Portillo uses his Bradshaw's 1913 Handbook of Indian, Foreign and Colonial Travel, published when the British Raj was fifty-five years old, to chart a course through India's history from the days of The East India Company to the dawn of independence.

programme.title: E4 - Faster Disaster
programme.desc: As Malcolm Storey puts together his new team, a former rival seeks help on a big wager. Is this a chance to prove they can challenge Team 256?

programme.title: E9 - Shaved Doors, No Floors, Stolen Car

programme.title: E5 - Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Mikey D. haggles with a buddy for a sweet IROC Z28, taking him back to his glory days. Mario and Tommie compete to find the most girls to work a car wash at the lot.

programme.title: E5 - Black Panther Lexus
programme.desc: After the success of the Sriracha car, Lexus wants WCC to build a Black Panther inspired car to showcase their LC-500.

programme.title: E1 - Winter is Coming
programme.desc: As soon as the days get cold and dark insects begin to disappear from the meadows and fields. Their sum and hum slowly fades away and will finally be gone. All animals have their special ways to survive winter. Migrating birds like swallows and cranes fly towards south, a lot of mammals like deer get a thick winter fur or hide away and sleep where it’s warm. But what do insects do? And why are they all back in spring?

programme.title: E2 - Meadow of Horror
programme.desc: It is horror! It is murder! Brutal death as well as exciting fights with an exceptional last-minute rescue. And after seeing it – you will know the creepiest spot is actually the meadow in your neighborhood. With stylistic devices from the horror genre this extraordinary nature documentary takes you on a journey following a well-known hero with six legs, red wings and seven black dots through a seemingly normal meadow – but full of monsters.

programme.title: E3 - God's Darling: Beetles
programme.desc: Beetles have inhabited the Earth for more than 240 million years. There are around 380,000 kinds of beetles known to scientists and every year hundreds of new species are discovered. One fourth of the world’s animals are beetles. They have conquered almost every corner and every habitat on the planet and they have survived every global disaster. What is it that makes them so successful?

programme.title: E1 - Welcome to the Tundra
programme.desc: Wake up post-hibernation with 7 ravenous bears as Stage 1 of the competition kicks off. Battle wolves with new mom BoldFace, see tiny Stomper vie for power and Blondie’s love, and stand back as grizzled vet Bernie brawls with clueless teen Casanova.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of the Bear
programme.desc: Join a mother brown bear as she struggles to find food for her two young cubs while teaching them essential skills for the harsh winter ahead. Then visit a pair of tiny lynx kittens as they begin to venture away from the safety of their den.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of the Wolf
programme.desc: In the remote wilderness of the Carpathian Mountains lives an elusive predator that has inspired awe and fear throughout history: the Eurasian wolf. Discover the vital role that these once-misunderstood hunters play in protecting their ecosystem.

programme.title: E4 - The Road to Independence
programme.desc: As the babies grow, new power struggles break out in each troop. Watch as every member, from fierce Queen Crystal to low-ranking Erica, jockeys for position. Meanwhile, the babies start to understand how allies and enemies will shape their future.

programme.title: Masters Of Cantonese Cuisine
programme.desc: Masters of Cantonese Cuisine is a documentary on Lingnan (Guangdong) delicacies culture, originally created by Shenzhen Satellite TV. This is a brief history of food belonging to the Greater Bay Area, a history of customs and culture that belongs exclusively to Guangdong. The program focus on the local Guangdong delicacies, and led by a “delicacy searcher”, walking through streets in search of local specialities, visiting masters of Cantonese cuisines, and sharing unique tasting commentaries. In the meantime, the reflection on delicacies would be brought back to live studio, and two observers who are proficient in Cantonese cuisine cultures will have chats on tasting. From a spoon and a drop, it will extend to the taste of life and origin of culture embedded in the delicacies.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

E7 - Three Causes, One Death
programme.desc: A wealthy widow's sudden death perplexes investigators. But with conflicting causes of death and millions at stake, suspicion falls on those closest to her.

programme.title: E10 - Mother's Trigger
programme.desc: A 10-year-old calls 911: he shot his dad. It seems like a tragic accident-until nine years later, he reveals a darker truth.

programme.title: E2 - Fatal Vows
programme.desc: A woman's sudden death in a Detroit hotel unravels a dark web of secrets, lies, and deadly coincidences that hint at something far more sinister.

programme.title: E3 - Death Below Deck
programme.desc: When a Navy officer succumbs to a mysterious illness after months at sea, nothing makes sense, until an autopsy yields a stunning revelation. All roads lead to dead ends, until they zero in on an unlikely target.

programme.title: E4 - Death By Request
programme.desc: A devoted husband, military man, and father of three calls the police with a chilling confession: he's shot his wife. What first appears to be a straightforward homicide soon unravels into something far more complex.

programme.title: E5 - Left To Unrest
programme.desc: A massive changeover rocks the boat. A stew gets pulled in multiple and a flirty love triangle starts to heat up. The chef struggles to cater to vegan guests with particular palates and complaints.

programme.title: All's Well End's Well 2020
programme.desc: The Yau's brothers are a trio of scammers who make punishing baddies their mission. A misunderstanding leads them to fellow con artists the Lui's sisters, and they join hands to scam a notorious mob boss. Through a myriad of ingenious tricks and disguises, they bring the mobster to justice as romance blossoms swiftly...

programme.title: The Monkey King
programme.desc: Since the beginning of time, there existed in the world three clans; human, god and demon. As everything was destroyed during the great battle, Nuwa (Goddess of Works) used 36,500 magic boulders to repair Heaven. One of them fell accidentally down onto Earth and landed on the Mountain of Flowers and Fruits on an island far across the Eastern Sea. Over thousands of years, the magic boulder absorbed the energies of Heaven and Earth and the sacred lights of the Sun and Moon. A godly creature was nurtured inside the stone-egg and a full-grown monkey burst out from it one day. When the Patriarch Subodhi passed by on his way to collect herbs in the Mountain, he came upon the monkey. Impressed by his exceptional wit and godly he took the monkey back to the Divine Cave of Three Stars in Mountain Mi to teach him the Way and called him Sun Wukong...

programme.title: Stuntman
programme.desc: LEE Sam was the undisputed king of stunt choreography during the golden era of Hong Kong action cinema in the 80s. After a devastating stunt accident, Sam steps away from the industry for 30 years. However, his old friend, a veteran director, has now persuaded Sam to work as the stunt choreographer on what will be the director's last film. The only catch is that his film stars Wai - Sam's former stunt crew member who has since become a famous action star in his own right. Sam and Wai have a contentious history, with Sam's infamously overbearing and demanding personality clashing with Wai's own ego and ambition. By chance, Sam crosses paths with a young, ambitious stuntman named LEE Sai Long, who sees this as an opportunity to advance his career. Long is caught between Sam and his former protege turned rival. At the same time, Long helps Sam to reconcile with his estranged daughter, Cherry. As Sam returns to the world he once dominated, he must confront his past, mend fences w

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Humor Research Institute
programme.desc: Hong Kong comedies from the 1980's and 1990's had been widely popular and many of them are still considered as classics among the genre. In this episode, the “Humor Research Institute” has invited veteran filmmakers Chan Hing Kai, Ho Miu Ki and Jack Ng to talk about their comedy-creating experience and introduce how fascinating comedies are written.

programme.title: E11 - Aftermath
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Meanwhile, Danny and Lena take on a high-stakes case that uncovers deep-rooted secrets and forces unlikely alliances.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 《膽小鬼》電視劇是由檸萌影業、優酷聯合出品，鄭執編劇，張曉波執導，歐豪、王硯輝領銜主演，王玉雯、周依然、侯雯元主演的青春懸疑犯罪短劇集。該劇改編自鄭執的長篇小說《生吞》，該劇講述了一段四個少年的青春往事，多年後一樁重現的罪案，讓所有人不得不面對人性最真實的「黑白戰爭」。

programme.title: Flirting Scholar
programme.desc: Tong Park Foo is the top-grade scholar in Suzhou. On a feast day, Tong and his friends go to visit the temple and there, Tong meets Chau Heung for the first time. Tong is shaken at Chau's beauty. He decides to go after her. But Chau's master Mrs. Wah is very angry with Tong's family, how can Tong make Chau Heung his bride?

programme.title: Crime Story
programme.desc: Eddie Chan, a guilt-ridden cop trying to silence his demons from a recent shoot-out who is assigned to rescue kidnapped businessman Huang Yifei. It is a trail that leads Chan and his partner, Hung from Hong Kong to Taipei and back to Hong Kong. As the trail gets warmer, Chan begins to suspect that there are internal forces – including Hung – who seem to working against him...

programme.title: 3 Days Of A Blind Girl
programme.desc: Heung is temporarily blinded by an accident. While her doctor husband leaves Hong Kong for a meeting, an uninvited man arrives at their house. The man teases and tortures Heung, claiming that he is coming to avenge his wife...
